policy: Default state is quarantined. A topic goes live (added to topics.py + docs/initial-data.json, lesson moved back to docs/lessons/knowledge/) only after its lesson is reviewed and meets the standard. Review batch by batch, typically by category.

knowledge.name: Imitation and modeling (physical movements, creative expression, social behaviors, practical skills)
knowledge.reason: REPLACED (live) by Mirror neurons and learning by watching (1081). Grab-bag title; the lesson content was already a focused mirror-neurons/observational-learning lesson, promoted under the concept name.

knowledge.name: Construction and deconstruction (physical building, creative making, social structures, learning concepts)
knowledge.reason: MERGED into Building a blanket fort (133), which teaches the same structural-forces concept (load-bearing, tension, compression, center of gravity) with a stronger activity. Stays retired as duplicative.

knowledge.name: Caregiving and nurturing (physical care, creative projects, social relationships, learning mentorship)
knowledge.reason: REPLACED (live) by Attachment and the biology of caregiving (1082). Grab-bag title; content refocused on attachment theory, oxytocin, and responsive caregiving.

knowledge.name: Role-playing and simulation (physical activities, creative performance, social situations, learning scenarios)
knowledge.reason: REPLACED (live) by Pretend play and symbolic thinking (1083). Grab-bag title; content refocused on symbolic thinking, simulation, and theory of mind.

knowledge.name: Rhythm and timing (physical coordination, creative music, social synchronization, learning sequences)
knowledge.reason: REPLACED (live) by Rhythm and entrainment (1084). Grab-bag title; content refocused on the beat, meter, and neural entrainment.

knowledge.name: Reading and book exploration
knowledge.reason: REPLACED (live) by Phonemes and the sounds of language (1079). unfocused. Re-add as a linguistics lesson on the phoneme and how sound inventories differ across languages.

knowledge.name: Time and duration (physical cycles, human experience, sequences, measurement)
Patterns and systems (mathematical patterns, natural patterns, social patterns, thinking patterns)
Cause and effect (physical causation, social consequences, logical reasoning)
Change and adaptation (physical changes, human development, evolution, learning)
Energy and movement (physical energy, body movement, social dynamics)
Communication across forms (language, visual symbols, music, body language, information)
Structure and function (how things are built and what they do - bodies, societies, tools, buildings)
Interconnections (ecosystems, social networks, global connections, systems thinking)
Growth and development (biological growth, human development, skill development, societal progress)
Safety and protection (physical safety, emotional safety, environmental protection, social security)
